meaning: n.竹荚鱼类,美洲大西洋海岸所产的青鱼
examples: So can you bring some bluefish tuna back for us?
To the west was the mouth of a fertile river (the Hudson) packed with oysters, more stripers, sturgeon, shad, porgies and bluefish.
"It is easy to juggle the numbers to make a particular point, " said salmon activist Scott Levy, director and producer of RedFish Bluefish.
Last summer I kayak fished with him amid 6-foot swells, as all around us hungry bonito and bluefish chased thousands of inch-long sand eels.
